name: Fairfield Hills Golf Course & Range
address: S3308 Fox Hill Rd, Baraboo, WI 53913
about: Fairfield Hills Golf Course & Range is a family-friendly golf facility offering both outdoor course play and indoor HD golf simulator experiences. The venue provides flexible 3, 9, 12, or 18-hole options with three sets of tees to accommodate various skill levels and time constraints. It features the largest practice range in the area and Wisconsin Dells' only HD Golf Simulator facility, making it suitable for all weather conditions. The facility emphasizes a relaxed, accessible atmosphere without forcing players into foursomes with strangers.
why_golfers_like_it: Largest practice range in the area
Wisconsin Dells' only HD Golf Simulator facility

food_and_drink.notes: On-course dining and event catering available for weddings and group outings
Available for events and weddings; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Wisconsin Dells' only HD Golf Simulator facility

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state club rental availability, but it mentions club fitting services, suggesting they may provide rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility offers on-site food and beverages for events and weddings, but BYOB policy for simulator play isn't specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Most players can complete a 9-hole round in less than 2 hours and a 12-hole round in about 2.5 hours, though 18-hole time isn't explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: Is this place kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility caters to all skill levels including beginners and offers junior golf programs, making it family-friendly.
